home.heroHeadline: Ikeduru ga-adị onwe ya, nke ndị nke ya wuru
home.heroSubhead: IEDF na-ejikọta ụmụ Ikeduru bi n'ụlọ na ndị nọ na mba ọzọ, ndị kwesiri ikwu ha onwe ha n'ịkwalite mmepe Ikeduru site n'itinye ego ndị ahịa nzuzo na-eduga, nkwado obodo, na ezigbo mmepe akụ na ụba.
home.milestoneTodayLabel: Ọrụ ndị na-aga n'ihu ugbu a
home.newsletterSubtitle: Nweta ozi banyere ọganihu IEDF, e nyere ugboro abụọ n'ọnwa.

footer.apolitical: IEDF bụ nzukọ na-abụghị nke gọọmentị, na-abụghị nke ọdịmma onwe, na-abụghị nke ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị.
